issues.sample: THE VEHICLE WAS STATIONARY IN A DRIVEWAY FOR APPROXIMATELY 2 HOURS. AFTER PULLING AWAY FROM THE HOUSE, DASH PANEL INDICATORS WERE SHOWING MALFUNCTIONS ON BRAKE SYSTEMS, AWS, ETC. IT SHOWED THAT ALL COMPUTER SYSTEMS WERE MALFUNCTIONING. I DROVE IMMEDIATELY TO THE DEALER. INSPECTIO

WHILE DRIVING ON SATURDAY MORNING 9/29/18, I STOPPED AT A STOP LIGHT AND MY 2018 TOYOTA  RAV4 LOST ALL ENGINE POWER WHILE IN TRAFFIC. THE COMPUTER VIDEO SCREEN SHOWED THE MESSAGE "CHARGING SYSTEM FAILURE\MALFUNCTION".  I THEN  ATTEMPTED TO RESTART THE VEHICLE AND IT DID NOT CRANK

I WAS DRIVING IN A FAST FOOD DRIVE THROUGH.  IT WAS A STOP AND GO PACE BECAUSE THERE WERE AROUND 5 CARS BEFORE ME AND WAS TRAVELING APPROX 3 MPH.  I BEGAN TO PROCEED BUT THIS TIME AS I WENT TO APPLY MY BRAKES THEY WENT TO THE FLOOR AND I COULDN'T STOP THE CAR.  IN ORDER TO AVOID

FROM A DEAD STOP WHEN ACCELERATING THE VEHICLE WILL NOT SPEED UP IT ACTS LIKE ITS IN 6TH GEAR. TO GAIN CONTROL I NEED TO PUSH THE ACCELERATOR TO THE FLOOR & THEN IT SPEEDS UP ALMOST UNCONTROLLABLY. THIS HAPPEN AT 12 TIMES. SEE MY COMMENT BELOW THAT I SENT TO TOYOTA CORPORATE OFFI

THE ILLUMINATION PROVIDED BY THE HEADLIGHTS ON THE 2018 RAV4 XLE I PURCHASED ON DECEMBER 28, 2017 IS DANGEROUSLY UNSAFE TO DRIVE ON UNLIT RURAL ROADS.  SEE ATTACHED LETTER DATED JANUARY 6, 2017 AND PIC.  I HAVE MORE PICS AND SEVERAL VIDEOS, IF NEEDED. *JS    THE CONSUMER STATED T

narrative.headline: Electrical problems dominate the complaints, with a notable count of fires
narrative.summary: Across 324 owner complaints filed with NHTSA, electrical system issues are by far the most reported, making up 127 reports (39%) and linked to 22 fires, 5 crashes, and 3 injuries. Engine complaints come next with 32 reports (10%) and 10 fires. The brake reports are smaller in number (30, 9%) but carry the most crashes of any area, with 10. Power train and exterior lighting round out the top five. No deaths were reported in any of these areas.

issues.sample: THE VEHICLE WAS STATIONARY IN A DRIVEWAY FOR APPROXIMATELY 2 HOURS. AFTER PULLING AWAY FROM THE HOUSE, DASH PANEL INDICATORS WERE SHOWING MALFUNCTIONS ON BRAKE SYSTEMS, AWS, ETC. IT SHOWED THAT ALL COMPUTER SYSTEMS WERE MALFUNCTIONING. I DROVE IMMEDIATELY TO THE DEALER. INSPECTIO
issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: The clear top complaint with 127 reports (39%). It is also the area with the most fires by far, at 22, along with 5 crashes and 3 injuries. Worth a careful inspection of the electronics and warning systems.

issues.sample: WHILE DRIVING ON SATURDAY MORNING 9/29/18, I STOPPED AT A STOP LIGHT AND MY 2018 TOYOTA  RAV4 LOST ALL ENGINE POWER WHILE IN TRAFFIC. THE COMPUTER VIDEO SCREEN SHOWED THE MESSAGE "CHARGING SYSTEM FAILURE\MALFUNCTION".  I THEN  ATTEMPTED TO RESTART THE VEHICLE AND IT DID NOT CRANK
issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: The second most reported area with 32 reports (10%), including 10 fires, 3 crashes, and 1 injury. Several owners describe sudden loss of engine power while driving.

issues.sample: I WAS DRIVING IN A FAST FOOD DRIVE THROUGH.  IT WAS A STOP AND GO PACE BECAUSE THERE WERE AROUND 5 CARS BEFORE ME AND WAS TRAVELING APPROX 3 MPH.  I BEGAN TO PROCEED BUT THIS TIME AS I WENT TO APPLY MY BRAKES THEY WENT TO THE FLOOR AND I COULDN'T STOP THE CAR.  IN ORDER TO AVOID
issues.title: Service Brakes
issues.blurb: 30 reports (9%), but the highest crash count of any area here at 10, plus 2 fires and 2 injuries. Owners describe brakes going to the floor with no stopping power, so check this closely.

issues.title: Power Train
issues.blurb: 26 reports (8%), tied to 2 crashes and 2 injuries, with no fires reported. Complaints include hesitation followed by sudden surges of acceleration.

issues.title: Exterior Lighting
issues.blurb: 22 reports (7%), with 1 crash and 1 fire and no injuries. The recurring theme is headlights that owners feel are too dim to drive safely on dark roads.
